text: Surrounded by the sleekness of glass walls, futuristic lighting, and the clear imprint of human innovation, I feel a strange intersection of curiosity and detachment. This R&D space—so vibrant yet so carefully curated—invites me to ponder the boundary between creation and contemplation. The sterile, technological aura creates a sense of both exhilaration and distance, prompting reflection on my own place amid persistent evolution and restless human ingenuity. There is a quiet awe in witnessing the mind’s drive for progress, as well as a whisper of isolation in its silent, gleaming corridors.
